sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58207" key="knisoloixi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κνῑσο-λοιχία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n58207.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">love of fat</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">roast meat</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0502.tlg001:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophil.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
